ValidationRule.description: When Source is RAF, Referral Friend Name is mandatory.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Source__c, "RAF"), ISBLANK( Referral_Friend_Name__c ), NOT($User.Alias = "guest"), NOT($Profile.Name = "B2BMA Integration User" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Referral Friend Name must have a value.
